scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "pnpm --prefix backend dev" "npx --yes pnpm@10 --prefix frontend --filter @vben/web-antd run dev"
scripts.build: concurrently "pnpm --prefix backend build" "npx --yes pnpm@10 --prefix frontend build"
scripts.install:all: pnpm --prefix backend install && npx --yes pnpm@10 --prefix frontend install
